nav.style: background-color: rgba(15, 17, 26, 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1030;

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-start align-items-lg-center gap-3 mt-3 mt-lg-0

div.style: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 30px; padding: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);

a.class: btn btn-sm rounded-pill text-white js_change_lang d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
a.t-attf-style: #{request.env.lang == 'en_US' and 'background: rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.3); font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.5);' or 'background: transparent; opacity: 0.6; border: 1px solid transparent;'}
a.style: width: 45px; height: 32px; font-size: 0.8rem; transition: all 0.3s ease;

a.class: btn btn-sm rounded-pill text-white js_change_lang d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
a.t-attf-style: #{request.env.lang == 'id_ID' and 'background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.5);' or 'background: transparent; opacity: 0.6; border: 1px solid transparent;'}
a.style: width: 45px; height: 32px; font-size: 0.8rem; transition: all 0.3s ease;

ul.style: background-color: rgba(15, 17, 26, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);

div.p: © 2026 Smart Lost & Found. Group 4.
Reliable platform to report and find lost items on campus. Fast, easy, and secure for all students.

form.class: hero-search-form d-flex align-items-center bg-dark p-2 rounded-pill mb-4

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search for your lost item here

button.class: btn btn-grad rounded-pill px-4 py-2 font-weight-bold text-white

div.class: bg-primary rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3
bg-info rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3

div.style: width: 350px; height: 350px; background: var(--grad-primary); border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.2; filter: blur(60px); position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; z-index: 0;

div.p: Create your lost item report quickly and in detail to increase the chances of finding it.

div.style: background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(35,40,75,0.6) 0%, rgba(120,115,245,0.3) 100%); border-color: rgba(120,115,245,0.5);
div.p: Found something? Help the owner by reporting the item you found.
Monitor the progress of your lost or found item reports in real-time.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-end border-bottom border-secondary pb-2 mb-4

span.class: badge bg-danger text-white rounded px-2 py-1

div.p: Lost at

a.class: text-white-50 small text-decoration-none border border-secondary rounded px-2 py-1

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-end border-bottom border-secondary pb-2 mb-4

div.p: Location:

a.class: text-white-50 small text-decoration-none border border-secondary rounded px-2 py-1

div.p: You have not created any lost item reports.

span.class: badge bg-warning text-dark rounded px-2 py-1
badge bg-success text-white rounded px-2 py-1
badge bg-danger text-white rounded px-2 py-1
badge bg-secondary text-white rounded px-2 py-1

div.p: Lost at

a.class: text-white-50 small text-decoration-none border border-secondary rounded px-2 py-1

div.p: You have not reported any found items.

span.class: badge bg-warning text-dark rounded px-2 py-1
badge bg-success text-white rounded px-2 py-1
badge bg-danger text-white rounded px-2 py-1
badge bg-secondary text-white rounded px-2 py-1

div.p: Location:

a.class: text-white-50 small text-decoration-none border border-secondary rounded px-2 py-1

div.p: Help us find your item by filling out the lost item report form

div.label: Reference Photo (Optional)
div.small: Help us identify your item by uploading a reference photo.

button.class: btn btn-grad w-50 py-3 text-uppercase font-weight-bold

div.p: Help the owner find their item by reporting the item you found.

div.label: Item Photo (Optional)
div.small: Please upload a photo of the found item to help the owner identify it.

button.class: btn btn-grad w-50 py-3 text-uppercase font-weight-bold

t.p: Browse all reported lost items on campus
Browse all reported found items on campus
Browse the entire Lost & Found database

button.class: btn btn-grad rounded-pill px-4 py-2 font-weight-bold text-white

div.p: No items match your search criteria.

h3.class: text-white font-weight-bold mb-4 border-bottom border-secondary pb-2

div.style: background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(30,35,55,0.8) 0%, rgba(120,115,245,0.2) 100%); border-radius: 15px; border-bottom: 3px solid #7873F5;

span.class: badge bg-danger text-white rounded px-2 py-1

h3.class: text-white font-weight-bold mb-4 border-bottom border-secondary pb-2

div.style: background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(30,35,55,0.8) 0%, rgba(30,160,110,0.2) 100%); border-radius: 15px; border-bottom: 3px solid #1ea06e;

a.class: btn btn-outline-secondary text-white btn-sm rounded-pill px-3

div.style: position: relative; width: 100%; padding-top: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); cursor: zoom-in;

div.class: bg-dark text-white rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.p: Location Found
Date Found
Description

div.style: border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(30,160,110,0.1) 0%, rgba(35,40,75,0.6) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(30,160,110,0.3);
div.p: Silakan berikan deskripsi spesifik beserta foto bukti kepemilikan Anda untuk diverifikasi oleh admin.

textarea.name: proof_description
textarea.placeholder: Deskripsikan ciri khusus (cth. warna spesifik, merk, isi dompet, wallpaper HP, dll)

div.label: Foto Bukti Kepemilikan (Wajib)
div.small: Lampirkan foto yang membuktikan bahwa ini milik Anda (cth. foto Anda menggunakannya, struk pembelian, box, dll).

button.class: btn btn-grad w-100 py-3 rounded-pill font-weight-bold
button.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1ea06e 0%, #157347 100%); font-size: 1.1rem; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(30,160,110,0.4);

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9); z-index:99999; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:zoom-out;

a.class: btn btn-outline-secondary text-white btn-sm rounded-pill px-3

div.style: position: relative; width: 100%; padding-top: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); cursor: zoom-in;

div.class: bg-dark text-white rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.p: Reporter: User
Location Lost
Date Lost
Description

div.style: border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(120,115,245,0.1) 0%, rgba(35,40,75,0.6) 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(120,115,245,0.3);
div.p: Silakan berikan deskripsi kondisi penemuan beserta foto barang yang ditemukan untuk dikirimkan ke admin.

textarea.name: proof_description
textarea.placeholder: Deskripsikan secara rinci di mana, kapan, dan bagaimana kondisi barang saat Anda menemukannya.

div.label: Foto Barang yang Ditemukan (Wajib)
div.small: Lampirkan foto asli dari barang yang baru saja Anda temukan tersebut sebagai bukti ke admin.

button.class: btn btn-grad w-100 py-3 rounded-pill font-weight-bold
button.style: background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6c5ce7 0%, #a29bfe 100%); font-size: 1.1rem; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(108,92,231,0.4);

div.style: display:none; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9); z-index:99999; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:zoom-out;

div.p: You have not submitted any ownership claims.

div.h4: Welcome to the Campus Citizen Portal!
div.p: You can now access the advanced Lost & Found dashboard with a new theme.

t.div: Please complete your Phone/WhatsApp Number before using the reporting features.

button.class: btn btn-grad text-white px-5 py-2 font-weight-bold
btn btn-grad text-white px-5 py-2 font-weight-bold
